name: Texas Marinated Brisket
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup red wine or cider vinegar
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a medium-sized saucepan over medium heat.
2. Add garlic and onion; cook for 8 minutes or until softened.
3. Stir in vinegar, lemon juice, hot sauce, ketchup, mustard, and cayenne.
4. Simmer, covered, for 15 minutes.
5. Remove from heat; let stand 20 minutes or until cooled.
6. Place meat in a roasting pan. Brush both sides of the meat with the sauce, spooning any remaining sauce on top.
7. Cover; refrigerate overnight.
8. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
9. Bake meat, covered, for 2 hours.
10. Reduce oven temperature to 250°F (125°C). Cook for an additional 6 hours or until fork-tender.
11. Slice meat against the grain. Serve with bottled barbecue sauce (or your own favorite recipe) for dipping.
